attribution: Federal Trade Commission, Heads Up: Stop. Think. Connect., Simplified Chinese, August 2023; no FTC endorsement or affiliation is implied.
modification_notice: Extracted only complete Simplified Chinese prose sentences from the checksum-pinned FTC-authored PDF, joined PDF layout wraps and cross-page sentences, removed headings, page furniture, English parallel text, navigation URLs, and incomplete fragments, and added input-only provenance; no images, seals, expected text, or converter output were used.
known_biases: The booklet is an official U.S.-focused online-safety translation for children and caregivers, not representative of all Taiwan traffic.
Social-media, privacy, account-security, cyberbullying, and device-safety language is intentionally concentrated.
Short commands and pronoun-dependent sentences require input-only eligibility review.
Only PDF text authored by the FTC is extracted; graphics, seals, and linked or third-party materials are excluded.
A maximum of 10% of the final candidate pool may come from this source.
